testcase.name: Electron shell main process > exports a hardened webPreferences contract
Electron shell main process > uses 1440x900 default and 1024x720 minimum window size
Electron shell main process > buildWindowOptions wires the security contract and a preload script
Electron shell main process > applies platform-specific titlebar styling
Electron shell main process > createWindow boots and registers hardening handlers
Electron shell main process > resolves a renderer entry path under apps/renderer/out
preload bridge > exposes window.electronAPI via contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld
preload bridge > request() calls ipcRenderer.invoke('api:request', args)
preload bridge > stream() registers listeners for event/end/error channels
preload bridge > stream() cancel removes listeners and invokes api:stream:cancel
preload bridge > saveAs() calls ipcRenderer.invoke('dialog:saveAs', args)
preload bridge > openExternal() calls ipcRenderer.invoke('shell:openExternal', args)
preload bridge > getVersion() calls ipcRenderer.invoke('app:getVersion')
preload bridge > does not expose ipcRenderer directly on electronAPI
preload bridge > hardwareCheck() calls ipcRenderer.invoke('hardware:check')
crash-reporter > starts crashReporter with uploadToServer disabled
crash-reporter > uncaught exception writes crash JSON file
crash-reporter > sanitizes Bearer and X-Audiomorph-Token values
crash-reporter > calls app.exit(1) after crash write
crash-reporter > getCrashLogDir resolves to userData/logs/crashes
hardware check enforcement and IPC > enforceHardwareRequirements passes when detect() returns ok=true
hardware check enforcement and IPC > enforceHardwareRequirements shows dialog and exits with code 1 when detect fails
hardware check enforcement and IPC > registerHardwareIpcHandler registers hardware:check and returns HardwareReport
setupAppLifecycle > single-instance lock acquired proceeds normally
setupAppLifecycle > single-instance lock failure quits immediately
setupAppLifecycle > second-instance focuses and restores existing window
setupAppLifecycle > window-all-closed on non-macOS quits app
setupAppLifecycle > window-all-closed on macOS does not quit app
setupAppLifecycle > deep-link URL logging is masked (no query params)
IPC bridge > api:request proxies with Authorization token and returns status/body
IPC bridge > api:cancel aborts in-flight api:request
IPC bridge > api:stream forwards SSE messages to renderer via webContents.send
IPC bridge > api:stream:cancel aborts active stream
IPC bridge > fs:copyFile rejects path traversal outside allowlist
IPC bridge > shell:openExternal enforces allowlist
IPC bridge > api:request forwards error envelope response verbatim
IPC bridge > renderer response values never include sidecar token
vault IPC handlers > vault:get returns { present } and never secret value
vault IPC handlers > vault:set calls vault.set and returns ok
vault IPC handlers > vault:delete calls vault.delete
vault IPC handlers > vault:has calls vault.has and returns present
vault IPC handlers > getSecretForSidecar returns decrypted value but IPC responses do not
buildMenu > macOS includes native app menu
buildMenu > win/linux includes File > Quit
buildMenu > DevTools menu item exists only in dev mode
buildMenu > sets application menu with built menu
linux packaging > electron-builder.yml linux section has required fields
linux packaging > electron-builder.yml linux desktop entry has required keys
linux packaging > electron-builder.yml deb section lists all required runtime deps
linux packaging > electron-builder.yml deb section wires postinst.sh afterInstall hook
linux packaging > postinst.sh exists, has bash shebang, and uses strict mode
linux packaging > postinst.sh contains nvidia-smi check with all fallback paths
linux packaging > postinst.sh prints red error and exits 1 when nvidia-smi missing
linux packaging > postinst.sh has valid bash syntax
linux packaging > build-linux.sh exists, is executable, and has valid bash syntax
linux packaging > build-linux.sh runs bun build:all and electron-builder --linux --x64
mac packaging > entitlements plist is valid XML and contains all required keys
mac packaging > sign-python afterPack hook exports a function
mac packaging > build script contains required env guards
mac packaging > env guard logic fails fast with descriptive missing variable
mac packaging > env guard logic passes when all required variables are set
win packaging > electron-builder.yml win section has required fields
win packaging > electron-builder.yml nsis section has required fields
win packaging > installer.nsh contains NVIDIA check via Get-CimInstance (not wmic)
win packaging > installer.nsh uses customInit macro and PowerShell exec
win packaging > build-win.sh exists, is executable, and has valid bash syntax
win packaging > build-win.sh runs electron-builder --win --x64 and does not require WIN_CSC vars
no-updater guard > sets autoDownload to false
no-updater guard > sets autoInstallOnAppQuit to false
no-updater guard > checkForUpdates becomes a no-op
no-updater guard > checkForUpdatesAndNotify becomes a no-op
no-updater guard > registers update-available listener that does not download
testcase.system-err: Auto-update is disabled in AudioMorph Studio

testcase.name: SidecarManager > spawn + handshake happy path emits ready and exposes API base URL
SidecarManager > handshake timeout rejects when no stdout arrives
SidecarManager > graceful shutdown deletes pid file when process exits on SIGTERM
SidecarManager > force kills sidecar when process hangs after SIGTERM
SidecarManager > zombie reaper SIGKILLs existing audiomorph.main pid before spawn
SidecarManager > restart loop guard emits fatal after crash loop and prevents further restart
SidecarManager > never logs raw token in sidecar output
AuditLog > append writes JSON line to log file
AuditLog > never logs secret value content
AuditLog > multiple appends produce multiple lines
KeyVault > set encrypts and writes vault file
KeyVault > get decrypts and returns value
KeyVault > get returns null for missing key
KeyVault > delete removes key from vault
KeyVault > has returns true/false without decrypting
KeyVault > clear empties vault
KeyVault > atomic write uses vault.tmp renamed to vault.enc
KeyVault > safeStorage unavailable falls back to base64 only without throw
